alkylation reagent: alkylated with 11 mM iodoacetamide for 15 min at room temperature in darkness
collision energy: peptides were then selected for MS/MS using an NCE setting of 28
enrichment method: Kcr-containing peptides were enriched with immobilized anti-Kcr
fractionation method: fractionated into fractions by high-pH reverse-phase HPLC
instrument: subjected to tandem MS (MS/MS) in Q ExactiveTM Plus
ionization type: The electrospray voltage applied was 2.0 kV
labeling: involving TMT/iTRAQ (tandem mass tag/isobaric tagging for multiplexed relative and absolute protein quantitation)
reduction reagent: the protein solution was reduced with 5 mM dithiothreitol
reduction concentration: the protein solution was reduced with 5 mM dithiothreitol
